parsed.summary: Portfolio flat across all 11 instruments; no position changes. Gross target 1.523 maintained. Trend alignment mixed: USDJPY, SILVER, BRENT, WTI show uptrend; EURUSD, GOLD, UST10Y, UST30Y, BTC show downtrend; DAX and SPX in warmup phase. Recent performance weak: BRENT and WTI down ~26% (21d), BTC down 16% (21d), GOLD down 4.4% (21d). Volatility elevated in energy (0.81–0.82 percentile), moderate in equities and crypto (0.48–0.72), depressed in USDJPY (0.0) and EURUSD (0.11). 5-day reversals in SILVER (+8.2%), BTC (+7.6%), and GOLD (+2.3%) suggest short-term bounce against longer downtrends.
notable_risks: Energy complex (BRENT, WTI) down 19–27% over 21–63d despite uptrend signals; trend-following lag risk
USDJPY at zero volatility percentile; potential regime break or data anomaly
Negative 63d returns in BRENT (−21.7%), GOLD (−12.9%), SILVER (−11.5%), WTI (−19.6%) conflict with held long positions
Large short UST10Y (−0.477) and UST30Y (−0.251) positions in downtrend; duration risk if yields stabilize
notable_supports: SPX +12.05% (63d) and DAX +6.01% (63d) provide equity upside momentum despite recent flatness
USDJPY +0.78% (63d) with consistent uptrend; largest position (0.259) anchors portfolio
5-day reversals in commodities (SILVER, BRENT, GOLD) may signal short-term stabilization
Moderate volatility regime (0.42–0.72 range) in most positions supports trend-following validity
